creator: vchimishuk@yandex.ru
text:
audio/sndio port ships sndio(7) man page, which in its turn contains links to audio(4) and midi(4). Those links are broken.

$ man sndio | grep 'audio(4)' 
     sioctl_open(3), audio(4), midi(4), sndiod(8)
$ man audio
No manual entry for "audio"
$ man midi 
No manual entry for "midi"
$
